description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a prominent hip roof covered in dark gray shingles. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, likely stucco or painted concrete, and large rectangular windows provide ample natural light on multiple sides. The front facade includes a sheltered porch area supported by white columns, with a wooden deck extending from the entrance. The property is set on a rectangular green lawn, bordered by a simple white fence on one side. The rear of the bungalow is more understated, with fewer windows and no porch, emphasizing privacy and simplicity.
description: A single-story bungalow with a hip roof, light-colored walls, large windows, and a covered front porch set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch with columns, and two large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long hip roof and three large windows, with minimal architectural detailing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back wall, a small window, and the roof's overhang.
description_view_3: Back-side view showing the porch from behind, sliding glass doors, and the side extension of the roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
